commands.name: setup
commands.description:
Set up your Agent 365 environment with granular control over each step

Recommended execution order:
  0. a365 setup requirements           # Check prerequisites (optional)
  1. a365 setup infrastructure        (or skip if infrastructure exists)
  2. a365 setup blueprint
  3. a365 setup permissions mcp
  4. a365 setup permissions bot
Or run all steps at once:
  a365 setup all                      # Full setup (includes infrastructure)
  a365 setup all --skip-infrastructure # Skip infrastructure if it already exists

For non-admin users — complete GA-only grants after setup all:
  a365 setup admin --config-dir "<path>"  # Run as Global Administrator

commands.name: requirements
commands.description:
Validate prerequisites for Agent 365 setup
Runs modular requirement checks and provides guidance for any issues found

This command will:
  - Check all prerequisites needed for Agent 365 setup
  - Report any issues with detailed resolution guidance
  - Continue checking all requirements even if some fail
  - Provide a summary of all checks at the end

commands.name: infrastructure
commands.description:
Create Azure infrastructure
Minimum required permissions: Azure Subscription Contributor or Owner

commands.name: blueprint
commands.description:
Create agent blueprint (Entra ID application registration)
Minimum required permissions: Agent ID Developer role

commands.name: permissions
commands.description:
Configure OAuth2 permission grants and inheritable permissions
Minimum required permissions: Global Administrator

commands.name: mcp
commands.description:
Configure MCP server OAuth2 grants and inheritable permissions
Minimum required permissions: Global Administrator

commands.name: bot
commands.description:
Configure Messaging Bot API OAuth2 grants and inheritable permissions
Minimum required permissions: Global Administrator

Prerequisites: Blueprint and MCP permissions (run 'a365 setup permissions mcp' first)
Next step: Deploy your agent (run 'a365 deploy' if hosting on Azure)

commands.name: custom
commands.description:
Configure custom resource OAuth2 grants and inheritable permissions
Minimum required permissions: Global Administrator

Prerequisites: Blueprint created (run 'a365 setup blueprint' first)

commands.name: copilotstudio
commands.description:
Configure Power Platform CopilotStudio.Copilots.Invoke permission
Minimum required permissions: Global Administrator

Prerequisites: Blueprint (run 'a365 setup blueprint' first)

commands.name: all
commands.description:
Run complete Agent 365 setup (all steps in sequence)
Includes: Infrastructure + Blueprint + Permissions + Endpoint

Minimum required permissions (Global Administrator has all of these):
  - Azure Subscription Contributor (for infrastructure and endpoint)
  - Agent ID Developer role (for blueprint creation)
  - Global Administrator (for permission grants and admin consent)

commands.name: admin
commands.description:
Complete OAuth2 permission grants that require Global Administrator.

Run this after 'a365 setup all' has been executed by an Agent ID Admin or Developer.
Point --config-dir at the folder containing the agent's a365.config.json and
a365.generated.config.json files.

Required permissions:
  - Global Administrator

Typical handoff workflow:
  1. Agent ID Admin runs: a365 setup all
  2. Agent ID Admin shares the config folder with a Global Administrator
  3. Global Admin runs:   a365 setup admin --config-dir "<path-to-config-folder>"

commands.name: create-instance
commands.description: DEPRECATED: Use 'a365 publish', optionally 'a365 deploy', then create instances in Microsoft Teams
